failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure
Regular maintenance and inspection of BPR valve
Implement temperature monitoring and automatic shutdown system

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=0.70686 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Test BPR valve operation under simulated blockage conditions
Conduct thermal stability test at 120°C to ensure no runaway reaction
